name: Path Equivalence: 'filedir*' (Wildcard)
description: The product does not properly handle wildcard characters ('*', '?') in path input, which may be expanded by the filesystem or shell to match unintended files, allowing attackers to bypass access controls or access multiple files at once.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path containing wildcard characters (* or ?) that flows to STORAGE[file_access] where the filesystem or shell expands the glob pattern, without a CONTROL node that rejects or escapes wildcard characters before file operations
